title: The official no_moon.jar modpack
description: An official modpack of no_moon.jar, a take on another psychological horror mod, the broken script.
body:
Need a server? Click [HERE](https://bisecthosting.com/kamussy) to get one 25% off!

---

If you need help, have questions, or need people to play with, join my [discord server](https://discord.gg/fYrff3FXG3)

Click [here](https://discord.gg/4mMbHZdq8H) for the official no_moon.jar discord server


---


No_moon.jar is a tribute mod for the broken script.



As you play, you will see anomalies and encounter dangerous entities. The moon will look different every night, and your world will slowly become corrupted by the void. This modpack is optimized for best performance and changed the config folders of the mods included for your convenience. This modpack includes:

74 random events

22 new entities

1 boss fight


---


I do NOT own any of the mods in this modpack. All credit goes to the owners.

[Voice chat curseforge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-voice-chat)
